summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of SATRWA Township app. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests passed (health, tariff, auth login/register, dues computation, maintenance pay one_month/full modes with conveyance, amenity gym+pool with dues gate, tiered pool pricing, history, receipt lookup, admin verify/series CRUD/xlsx export). Frontend E2E: login screen renders correctly, block selection works, new-flat register form appears with BHK/owner/phone/start_month inputs, home dues card + both hero cards visible, maintenance screen shows correct pending months & totals, pay/full and one-month segmented control works, conveyance switch adds 250, mock UPI pay screen (labeled 'MOCK PAYMENT · TEST MODE') accepts UPI ID and generates receipt with OP-prefixed number (OP009 observed), receipt screen renders PAID stamp with full breakdown (Type, Block/Flat, BHK, Months Paid, Period, UPI ID), admin PIN gate protects panel, admin panel shows active series + tabs for series/payments + export button + activate action for inactive series. Dues gate on amenity screen also loaded successfully. No React Native red screens, no console errors observed. No deprecated Expo packages detected (expo-linear-gradient, expo-router in use; no expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exports directly on module scope (mongo_url/client) — fine for this size (~430 lines) but any future growth should be split into modules (routes/services/models).
admin_verify accepts a raw dict body — consider a typed Pydantic model for consistency with other endpoints (SeriesCreate, SeriesActivate).
GET /api/admin/export takes pin as a query string param; this is acceptable given the app scope but the PIN will appear in server access logs. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Two test flats registered during this run with random suffix (T{run}A start=2025-01, T{run}B start=current). UI test also registered a Block F flat and made one maintenance payment (receipt OP009). One extra receipt series 'T??-1-5' was created via admin API and then OP series was re-activated so app remains in default state. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27 backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_satrwa_api.py pass. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env (default preview URL). Test data prefixed with 'T<uuid6>' block A/B, and 'UI<random>' block F for UI tests — safe to re-run. Receipt series counter increments each run; admin panel showed OP001–OP100 with Next OP010 after this session. If a future test needs a fresh series, admin can add a new one. Frontend testIDs available: block-select-{A..F}, flat-no-input, bhk-select-{2BHK|3BHK}, owner-name-input, phone-input, start-month-input, login-btn, register-btn, back-to-login, admin-link, dues-summary-card, maintenance-card, amenity-card, history-link, logout-btn, pay-full-tab, pay-one-tab, conveyance-switch, proceed-pay-btn, upi-id-input, upi-amount, confirm-pay-btn, receipt-card, receipt-number, done-btn, admin-pin-input, admin-verify-btn, series-tab, payments-tab, active-series-card, series-prefix-input, series-start-input, series-end-input, add-series-btn, activate-<id>, export-btn.
